inputs.label: Room Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the room in feet

inputs.label: Room Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the room in feet

inputs.label: Insulation Factor
inputs.businessContext: 1.0 for average, 0.8 for good, 1.2 for poor insulation

inputs.label: Total Window Area
inputs.businessContext: Total area of windows in square feet

inputs.label: Number of Occupants
inputs.businessContext: Average number of people in the room

inputs.label: Additional Appliance Heat
inputs.businessContext: Heat generated by appliances and electronics in BTU per hour

formulas.totalBTU: roomLength * roomWidth * ceilingHeight * 5 * insulationFactor + windowArea * 30 + occupants * 600 + applianceHeat
